source: grade-auditor judgment pass over tools/cas_check.py floor (63/63 elements present, 0 regressions); independent verification of crit 8/15 evidence files

0.name: Use-Cases & Anforderungen
0.rationale: 5 Kernfunktionen as UCs (UC-01/03/04/06/09) with Actor+Trigger+Outcome+Realises-FR; supporting UCs; stakeholder table; UML use-case diagram (docs/diagrams/use-cases.svg).

1.name: NfA nach SMART
1.rationale: 6 NfA, each with Zielwert + Messverfahren + Measured + governing ADR (docs/arc42/10: 'NfA-4 p95 < 200 ms ... measured 15.8 ms ... ADR-002/006').

2.name: Vision
2.rationale: Problemstellung + Vision w/ Zielgruppe + Abgrenzung + one KI-Nutzen sentence per Kernfunktion (docs/arc42/01 'KI-Nutzen je Kernfunktion': UC-04 'deliberately zero AI').

3.name: Architektur bild+text
3.rationale: C4 L1/L2 consistent with text; Architekturstil named + ADR-002; durchgaengiger roter Faden Problemstellung->freeze-line solution->Fazit; >=10 ADRs.

4.name: Perspektiven
4.rationale: Struktur (C4 component §5), Verhalten (runtime sequences + record-lifecycle states §6), Interaktion (OpenAPI + console contracts), each with diagram + explanatory text.

5.name: Datenmodell
5.rationale: ER diagram + db/migrations/ + pgvector (HNSW/cosine) documented in §8/§10.

6.name: Code-Struktur
6.rationale: Clean service split (ingestion/serving/mcp + console), per-service READMEs, sprechende Namen, Modulgrenzen consistent with §5 component view.

7.name: Framework-Konzepte
7.rationale: +1 today. DI (Depends/RepoDep), env-only get_settings(), boundary HTTPException(404)+declarative 422s, Pydantic validation idiomatic in code; framework choice justified; console Vitest/Playwright tests now wired into CI (PR #23, 163eda7; real package.json test script + 5 test files), closing the last 'durchgehend idiomatisch' crack.

8.name: Erkenntnisse
8.rationale: LEARNINGS.md: every entry ends with PR + merge SHA and an explicit accepted/corrected/rejected disposition on the AI suggestion (e.g. 'rejected ... PR #5, ac8296c').

9.name: Git-Repository
9.rationale: Clickable repo URL in docs/index.md; full history; CI on every push.

10.name: Abnahmekriterien
10.rationale: One G/W/T per UC with concrete observable + Verifies(NfA) cross-reference column (docs/arc42/10 Acceptance criteria); design-scope rows honestly labelled.

11.name: Teststrategie
11.rationale: Teststufen named+justified; 'Tests der KI-Anteile' with four named real families (guardrail boundary, gap-gate no-call, fill-reuse, fail-closed schema) in docs/arc42/13.

12.name: Unit-Tests
12.rationale: Core logic + error paths covered (>=100 tests, named error cases); suite green in CI.

13.name: Test-Ergebnisse
13.rationale: Pipeline/coverage output quoted verbatim AND interpreted in docs/arc42/10 ('residual misses are bounded and named, not blind spots'); screenshots only illustrate.

14.name: KI-Werkzeuge
14.gap: Erklaerung der Eigenstaendigkeit not yet final/signed (visible placeholder, blank Name/Ort/Datum/Unterschrift); owner-gated, finalise+sign before PDF hand-in to secure the 12-point tier (+5).
14.rationale: Per-phase structure (Generierung/Review/Refactoring/Recherche) + prompts/diffs/commit refs fully met in docs/method/ai-tools.md; conjunctive miss: Erklaerung der Eigenstaendigkeit is a self-declared unsigned placeholder ('Awaiting the owner's final text and signature'), so 'gemaess Aufgabenstellung vollstaendig' fails and the tier drops to ueberwiegend. Owner-gated by Fazit veto 3.
misses: Erklaerung der Eigenstaendigkeit not yet final/signed (visible placeholder, blank Name/Ort/Datum/Unterschrift); owner-gated, finalise+sign before PDF hand-in to secure the 12-point tier (+5).

15.name: KI-Services
15.rationale: Two substantial AI roles (fill-only ai_map seam + e5 embedding/MCP search); guardrails (AST boundary test, label law); Human-in-the-Loop review form (docs/arc42/05,06,08).

16.name: Container-Sub-Systeme
16.rationale: Compose + per-sub-system Dockerfiles + Helm; distributed-services choice explicitly justified vs modular monolith via ADR-002 (docs/arc42/07); oper/latency evidence captured in §7/§10.

17.name: Fazit
17.rationale: Three concrete, evidenced vetoes (PR/commit refs 057a6c1, 07cdfc5, PR #17) + honest limits + Uebertrag ('match the working mode to the blast radius of an error') in docs/method/fazit.md.
